Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Malachai's Loop Harmonic Spirit Shield Energy Shield: 276 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Unique ID: a2f1c8547fabff45e8bf86f6a4aa64846d8c53974482590280363be1bab64c9c Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-G-B LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 1 15% increased Spell Damage 248% increased Energy Shield +2 to Maximum Power Charges 20% chance to gain a Power Charge on Hit Lose all Power Charges on reaching Maximum Power Charges Shocks you when you reach Maximum Power Charges {mutated}+4% chance to Suppress Spell Damage per Power Charge
